arts.sum: AC Milan's transfer market ambitions are heating up as the club seeks to secure a marquee signing for their attack. While Santiago Gimenez remains the primary target, recent developments have brought João Félix back into the conversation. arts.ttl: Milan Step Up Efforts for Santiago Gimenez: €36m Offer Made
arts.sum: AC Milan are intensifying their efforts to sign Santiago Gimenez from Feyenoord, with the club preparing a strategic approach to secure the Mexican striker during the January transfer window. Calciomercato report that the Rossoneri have tabled an initial offer of 36 million euros, though Feyenoord is holding firm with a 40 million euro valuation.
